backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the chat backend, defining types and state for chatrooms, messages, reactions, user profiles, and active users, with functions for access control, messaging, flagging, and blob storage via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the chevron icon in ChatArea.tsx was moved to appear directly next to the category tag in the expanded header state, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of components, pages, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app with cache-busting meta tags, a root div, and a versioned module script tag pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom, and admin routes, conditionally hiding the header and footer on admin and chatroom pages.
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component allowing users to upload a custom image, remove their avatar, or select a GIF from Giphy (trending or searched) as their profile avatar.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat interface component with a collapsible header (chevron moved next to the category tag in expanded state), pinned video, scrollable message list with auto-scroll and deep-link targeting, reply context, and message input.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Displays a chatroom preview card with thumbnail rendering for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter media types, along with live status badges, participant counts, and formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Modal dialog for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (image upload, video URL, or Twitter post), including Twitter embed preview support.
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Confirmation dialog that warns users before navigating to an external URL, displaying the target link and offering Cancel/Continue actions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, an inline editable username field with alphanumeric validation, an avatar picker, and a back-to-lobby button when inside a chatroom.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing; authentication is intentionally not used in this app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders an individual chat message with support for reactions, pinning, replies, media embeds (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, Giphy), voice playback, reporting, and external link disclaimers.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat message input component supporting text, image upload, GIF search via Giphy, voice recording, and auto-detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs embedded in message text.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Renders a pinned YouTube or Twitch video as an embedded iframe within a chatroom, with an unpin button that calls the useUnpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: A voice message playback component with play/pause controls, a seekable slider, and a randomly generated waveform visualization; pauses other audio elements when playing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: A generic hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay (default 300ms) using setTimeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: Forces a fresh refetch of the chatroom list when the actor becomes ready by purging stale or empty cached entries and explicitly refetching the canonical chatrooms query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity state) via a React context and AuthClient, with a hook and provider component for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file covering chatroom queries, message queries, mutations (send, react, pin, unpin, etc.), image upload, and localStorage-based username/avatar management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens), and includes mobile-specific input styles and custom voice message range input styling.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatCompactNumber` that formats numbers into compact human-readable strings (k, M, B suffixes).
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy and fetch trending GIFs via the Giphy API, returning normalized GIF objects with preview and original URLs.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a lazy-loader for the html2canvas library.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using an HTML canvas, skipping GIFs and SVGs, and returning the smaller of the original or compressed file.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter embed rendering utility.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe preview fields (author, text, image) with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: Implements a versioned localStorage cache for Twitter oEmbed preview data with 7-day expiration and helpers to get, set, and clear cached previews.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail fetching utility.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail caching utility.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract video/clip IDs and generate thumbnail/embed URLs for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter/X URLs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and an Internet Identity authentication provider wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin moderation page that lists chatrooms with flagged message counts, supports filtering/searching, and allows admins to delete chatrooms via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, handles loading/error states, increments view count on load, and renders the ChatArea component with an optional target message ID from query params.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page displaying a searchable, filterable, and algorithmically sorted list of chatrooms (live rooms first, then by view count), with a dialog to create new chatrooms.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radius/shadows, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and a single completed feature request to reposition the chevron icon next to the category tag in the expanded chatroom header.
